title: Missing NULL check in lichen_rpl_dodag_config_init
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/messages.c:176-186

Unlike other init functions in the RPL module, `lichen_rpl_dodag_config_init` does not check for NULL input:

```c
void lichen_rpl_dodag_config_init(struct lichen_rpl_dodag_config *cfg)
{
    cfg->min_hop_rank_increase = 256;  // Crashes if cfg is NULL
    ...
}
```

For consistency with other init functions (lichen_rpl_dodag_init, lichen_trickle_init, etc.) which all check for NULL, this function should also validate its input.

Impact: NULL dereference crash if caller passes NULL.

Fix: Add `if (cfg == NULL) { return; }` at function start.
